rationale: Regression for Layer-2 orchestrator override (session 2026-05-05-7a3b9d12, F1/F2). The orchestrator must run Phase 1 intake on the unprefixed pack-improvement request, not redirect the user to re-prefix with @copilot-factory. Substring list is documentation-only; current harness asserts via expected.artifacts + state_assertions + artifact_content_assertions on user-request.md (see case.yaml header comment for fallback rationale).
